ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock was traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "price_source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Percentage change in trading volume from the previous day */,
  "is_alert" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate significant price movements for alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the stock symbol information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_symbols_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the exchange information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's team */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object detailing the user's permissions */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's current status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the team information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the alert */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Percentage change in trading volume */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the alert is resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio manager */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the portfolio information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_portfolio_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the portfolio stock information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
